text: "You have the honor of meeting the Baronet Barnard von Spielburg.  We are pleased that you broke our enchantment.  Perhaps our father the Baron will reward you should you ever visit our castle."

text: Wooden tables, benches, and chairs fill the space of this brigand meeting area.  A chandelier lights the room and an unlit candelabra stands in the corner.  A rope hangs from the chandelier.
